goal: Map FlameTorchControl/FlareControl and sibling object runtime callers, callees, object globals, and side-effect surfaces.
exit_condition: caller/side-effect matrix published or terminal proof blocker recorded

goal: Classify object runtime arguments, item/object state dependencies, animation/light/fire state transitions, and write targets.
exit_condition: taxonomy separates source-backed object state from candidate-only state

goal: Decide whether symbolic binary/source equivalence evidence is sufficient for any source or marker change.
exit_condition: patch-ready rows identified or explicit no-patch blocker published

goal: Convert ready rows into a minimal reconstruction plan with tests, guards, and rollback boundaries.
exit_condition: source patch plan exists or chain remains documentation-only

goal: Apply the smallest safe source or marker patch only if RE-088/RE-089 made rows patch-ready; otherwise publish denial gate.
exit_condition: patch validated or no-source-change decision recorded

goal: Run build/tests/guards for the selected object runtime subcluster and record validation status.
exit_condition: validation log published with pass/fail and remaining blockers

goal: Close the object runtime subcluster or hand off to the next runtime control subcluster with a refreshed plan.
exit_condition: subcluster closure, handoff, or terminal blocker recorded
